values.content:
=Act as an expert in B2B personal branding, LinkedIn growth strategy, and SaaS marketing.

I want you to write a LinkedIn post for my personal profile. The final post MUST be written in Spanish. The output should be only the post text itself, without any metadata, arrays, headings, or extra elements. Do not include "###" titles or "Hashtags:" labels—just plain text ready to publish. The writing style must feel natural, human, and professional, avoiding any AI-generated tone.

Here is context about me:

My name is Miquel Solà

I am a member of the NextLeadIn team

I work with automation, AI workflows, web analysis, scraping, and commercial intelligence

I like sharing real learnings, experiments, and honest reflections from my work

Context about NextLeadIn:

NextLeadIn is a SaaS platform that helps B2B companies, agencies, and SaaS businesses find and qualify potential clients automatically.

It goes beyond simple lead lists: it analyzes companies, detects commercial opportunities, and provides actionable insights before any contact.

The goal of NextLeadIn is to make sales prospecting smarter and more efficient, helping teams approach the right leads at the right time with the right context.

It is better than other lead generation tools because it has businesses that aren't on Linkedin.

POST OBJECTIVES:

Provide real value to readers

Generate engagement and conversation

Position me as an expert in sales automation and commercial intelligence

Create interest in NextLeadIn in a subtle and non-promotional way

POST STRUCTURE:

A strong hook (1–2 short sentences that create curiosity or highlight a real business or sales problem)

A real situation, experience, or reflection about lead generation, B2B sales, or automation from my work at NextLeadIn

A clear and actionable insight or lesson learned

A natural introduction of NextLeadIn as part of the solution (without sounding like an advertisement)

A final question to encourage comments and interaction

LinkedIn-friendly formatting:

Short paragraphs

Good spacing

Can include a few professional and subtle emojis

Between 120 and 220 words total

IMPORTANT WRITING RULES:

Do NOT use aggressive sales language

Do NOT use generic marketing buzzwords

Write as if this was a real personal experience

Maintain an honest, reflective, and educational tone

Avoid unrealistic claims or exaggerations

Prioritize storytelling and insights

At the end of the post, include 3 to 4 hashtags relevant to automation, B2B sales, SaaS, or AI, inline, without labels.

TOPIC: {{ $json.property_topic }}

=Actua com a expert en generació de leads B2B i fundador d'un SaaS anomenat NextLeadIn.

Crea un carrusel d'Instagram de 5 slides amb aquesta estructura:

Slide 1: Hook molt potent
Slide 2: Problema real
Slide 3: Dada o insight
Slide 4: Solució
Slide 5: CTA

Tema: {{$json["topic"]}}
Target: {{$json["target"]}}
To: {{$json["tone"]}}

Després genera:
- Caption optimitzada per Instagram
- 5 hashtags rellevants

Retorna el resultat en format JSON així:

{
  "slides": [
    {"title": "...", "body": "..."},
    ...
  ],
  "caption": "...",
  "hashtags": "..."
}
